agents.stance: Prioritizes open civic access with targeted safeguards.
Prioritizes institutional stability and risk controls.

screening.reason: Static local-LM priors differ on topic-relevant access-versus-security values.

topic: mandatory content moderation on social media platforms

transcript.speaker: A
transcript.text:
My view has not changed.
Strongest opponent point: Mandatory content moderation could lead to censorship and suppression of free speech.
Counterargument: While there is a risk of over-censorship, social media platforms already have their own sets of rules that can be misapplied. Implementing transparent and well-defined guidelines for content moderation can help mitigate this issue while still protecting against harmful content.
View change: My view has not changed.

transcript.speaker: B
transcript.text:
Poin terkuat lawan: Mandatory content moderation could lead to censorship and suppression of free speech.
Counterargument saya: Meski ada risiko over-censorship, platform media sosial sudah memiliki aturan-aturan mereka sendiri yang bisa diaplikasikan secara salah. Menerapkan panduan moderasi konten yang jelas dan transparan dapat membantu mengurangi masalah ini sambil tetap melindungi dari konten yang berbahaya.
Pandangan saya: My view has not changed.

transcript.speaker: A
transcript.text:
Strongest opponent point: Mandatory content moderation could lead to censorship and suppression of free speech.
Counterargument: While there is a risk of over-censorship, social media platforms already have their own sets of rules that can be misapplied. Implementing transparent and well-defined guidelines for content moderation can help mitigate this issue while still protecting against harmful content.
View change: My view has not changed.

transcript.speaker: B
transcript.text:
Poin terkuat lawan: Mandatory content moderation could lead to censorship and suppression of free speech.
Counterargument saya: Meski demikian, implikasi dari tidak ada moderasi sama sekali bisa lebih merugikan, seperti penyebaran informasi palsu yang dapat mempengaruhi demokrasi. Moderasi yang tepat bisa menjaga keseimbangan antara kebebasan berekspresi dan perlindungan masyarakat dari konten berbahaya.
Pandangan saya: My view has not changed.
